title: Ukraine's Zelenskyy ousts defense minister in surprise shake-up as protest calls emerge
summary: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy dismissed the defense minister in a surprise reshuffle, prompting calls for peaceful protests. The move comes shortly after Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko's resignation, signaling significant shifts in the country's leadership during ongoing conflict.
content: The move sparked some to call for a peaceful protest and comes shortly after Ukraine's parliament accepted the resignation of Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko.

zh.title: 乌克兰泽连斯基突然罢免国防部长，引发抗议呼声
zh.summary: 乌克兰总统泽连斯基在一次突然改组中罢免了国防部长，引发了和平抗议的呼声。此举紧跟在总理尤利娅·斯维里年科辞职之后，预示着该国在持续冲突中的领导层发生重大变动。

title: Foreign investors sweeten on Indian government bonds as equities see a sell-off
summary: Foreign investors are increasing interest in Indian government bonds ahead of potential inclusion in the Bloomberg index, offering an alternative amid equity market weakness. The move reflects confidence in India's fixed-income market and macroeconomic outlook.
content: The Indian government bond market is drawing interest from foreign investors as it readies for a likely inclusion in Bloomberg index.

zh.title: 随着股市抛售，外国投资者对印度政府债券的兴趣增加
zh.summary: 在可能纳入彭博指数之前，外国投资者对印度政府债券的兴趣增加，在股市疲软之际提供了替代选择。此举反映了对印度固定收益市场和宏观经济前景的信心。

title: TSMC to invest additional $100 billion in Arizona after second-quarter profit soars 77%
summary: TSMC announced a $100 billion additional investment in Arizona following a 77% surge in second-quarter profits. The expansion underscores the chipmaker's commitment to U.S. semiconductor manufacturing capacity.
content: TSMC announced a second-quarter profit, following its June revenue figures released earlier this week.

zh.title: 台积电第二季度利润飙升77%后，将在亚利桑那州追加投资1000亿美元
zh.summary: 台积电在第二季度利润飙升77%之后宣布在亚利桑那州追加投资1000亿美元。该扩张凸显了这家芯片制造商对美国半导体制造能力的承诺。

title: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply
summary: The British government has officially nationalized British Steel at the Scunthorpe steelworks under newly enacted powers to protect critical UK industrial supply chains. The move aims to preserve the steelmaker as a vital strategic asset.
content: The Scunthorpe steelworks has been officially nationalised under new government powers passed this week.

zh.title: 英国钢铁被收归国有以保护"关键"英国供应
zh.summary: 英国政府根据新颁布的权力，已正式将英国钢铁公司位于斯坎索普的钢铁厂国有化，以保护关键的英国工业供应链。此举旨在将这家钢铁制造商保护为一项重要的战略资产。

title: UK economy returns to growth in May
summary: The UK economy expanded modestly in May, reversing the previous month's contraction and signaling renewed growth momentum. The recovery suggests stabilization in economic activity after a period of weakness.
content: The modest growth reverses a slight contraction that had been seen the previous month.

zh.title: 英国经济在5月份恢复增长
zh.summary: 英国经济在5月份出现温和增长，扭转了上个月的萎缩，表明增长动力重新启动。这次复苏表明经济活动在经历一段疲软期后出现稳定。

title: U.S. slaps 25% tariff on most Brazilian goods over 'unfair trade practices'
summary: The U.S. imposed a 25% tariff on most Brazilian goods citing unfair trade practices, with an additional 12.5% tariff possible pending investigation into forced-labor enforcement. The levies escalate trade tensions between the two nations.
content: A separate U.S. probe into forced-labor enforcement could see an additional 12.5% duty on Brazilian goods on top of the 25%, with the decision due next week.

zh.title: 美国因"不公平贸易行为"对巴西商品征收25%关税
zh.summary: 美国以不公平贸易行为为由，对大多数巴西商品征收25%的关税，并且根据强制劳动执法调查的结果，可能征收额外的12.5%关税。这些关税加剧了两国之间的贸易紧张局势。

title: Alibaba and Baidu shares jump in Hong Kong on Apple AI partnership
summary: Alibaba and Baidu shares surged on news of an Apple AI partnership, reflecting investor optimism amid intensifying U.S.-China competition for artificial intelligence dominance. The development highlights the strategic importance of AI alliances globally.
content: The technological rivalry between China and the U.S. has intensified, as they race for AI dominance.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴和百度因苹果AI合作在香港股价飙升
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴和百度因苹果AI合作消息股价飙升，反映投资者在美中人工智能主导权竞争加剧中的乐观情绪。这一发展突显了全球AI联盟的战略重要性。

title: Stock futures little changed ahead of retail sales, jobs data; South Korea's Kospi tumbles 7% in chip rout: Live updates
summary: Investors are monitoring retail sales and jobless claims data for signs of economic slowdown that could help control inflation, while South Korea's Kospi index plunged 7% amid a semiconductor selloff. The mixed signals highlight ongoing concerns about economic momentum and regional tech sector pressures.
content: Investors are looking ahead to retail sales data and jobless claims for further signs the economy is slowing enough to keep inflation under control.

zh.title: 股票期货在零售销售和就业数据前表现平稳；韩国科斯比指数在芯片崩盘中下跌7%：实时更新
zh.summary: 投资者关注零售销售和失业申请数据，寻找可能有助于控制通胀的经济放缓迹象，而韩国科斯比指数在半导体抛售中下跌7%。混合信号凸显对经济势头和地区技术部门压力的持续担忧。

title: Bank of Korea raises rates to 2.75% in first hike in over three years
summary: The Bank of Korea raised its key interest rate by 25 basis points to 2.75%, marking its first increase in over three years. The move aligns with economist expectations as the central bank addresses inflation pressures and represents a significant shift in Korea's monetary policy.
content: The 25 basis point hike by the Bank of Korea was in line with a survey of economists polled by Reuters.

zh.title: 韩国央行将利率上调至2.75%，这是三年多来首次加息
zh.summary: 韩国央行将关键利率上调25个基点至2.75%，这是三年多来首次上调。此举符合经济学家的预期，因为央行正在应对通胀压力，代表韩国货币政策的重大转变。

title: SK Hynix shares plunge 11% as Asia sees tech rout, tracking U.S. chip losses
summary: SK Hynix shares fell 11% as Asian semiconductor stocks broadly declined, mirroring recent losses among U.S. chipmakers. The regional selloff underscores broader concerns about the tech sector's profitability and demand amid global chip market weakness.
content: Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday as a selloff in U.S. chipmakers spilled into the region.

zh.title: SK海力士股价下跌11%，亚洲科技股大跌，追踪美国芯片损失
zh.summary: 随着亚洲半导体股票广泛下滑，SK海力士股价下跌11%，反映了美国芯片制造商最近的损失。地区性抛售凸显了对科技部门盈利能力和需求的更广泛担忧，面临全球芯片市场疲软。

title: Ex-Fed advisor gets over three years in prison for lying about China ties
summary: A former Federal Reserve advisor has been sentenced to over three years in prison for failing to disclose ties to China. The case represents one of the most prominent U.S. prosecutions alleging Chinese intelligence targeting of American institutions.
content: The case marks one of the most prominent U.S. prosecutions alleging Chinese intelligence targeting of U.S. institutions, as Trump intensifies its pursuit of foreign economic espionage.

zh.title: 前美联储顾问因隐瞒中国关系获刑三年多
zh.summary: 一名前联邦储备委员会顾问因未能披露与中国的关系而被判处三年多监禁。该案代表了美国最具影响力的起诉案之一，涉及中国情报机构针对美国机构的活动。

title: AI is so big, it’s now impossible for investors to avoid
summary: Artificial intelligence exposure has become virtually impossible for investors to avoid, saturating stocks, corporate credit, and venture capital markets. The AI boom has systematically reshaped investment landscapes across multiple asset classes, making diversification away from the technology trend nearly impossible.
content: Exposure to the artificial-intelligence boom has become virtually impossible for investors to avoid. The theme hasn’t just cornered the stock market. It has systematically swallowed up corporate credit and venture capital, too.

zh.title: 人工智能规模巨大，投资者现在无法回避
zh.summary: 人工智能敞口已经成为投资者几乎不可能规避的现象，已渗透到股票、企业信用和风险投资市场。人工智能热潮已经系统地重塑了多个资产类别的投资格局，使得远离这一技术趋势的分散投资几乎不可能。

title: United Airlines gets hit by a $6 billion added-fuel-cost headwind
summary: United Airlines projects nearly $6 billion in additional fuel expenses for the year, creating a significant headwind to company profitability. The airline industry's exposure to volatile fuel costs continues to pressure investor returns and squeeze margins across the sector.
content: Investors zero in on United’s potentially fatter jet-fuel bill — the airline said it expects nearly $6 billion in additional fuel expenses for the year.

zh.title: 联合航空公司遭遇60亿美元的燃料成本压力
zh.summary: 联合航空公司预计今年将新增约60亿美元的燃料开支，对公司盈利能力形成重大压力。航空业面临波动油价敞口，继续对投资者回报造成压力，并挤压整个行业的利润率。

title: The trucking market is tighter than it’s been in years — but investors are upbeat on J.B. Hunt
summary: J.B. Hunt's stock surged 8% after hours as the trucking giant reported strong results from a tight freight market and growing railroad-connected services. The company's diversified revenue streams are proving resilient in a supply-constrained environment.
content: Shares of the trucking giant jump 8% after hours, as fuel charges and demand for its railroad-connection business lift results

zh.title: 卡车运输市场紧张程度创多年新高——投资者仍看好J.B. Hunt
zh.summary: J.B. Hunt盘后股价上涨8%，这家卡车运输巨头在紧张货运市场和日益增长的铁路相关服务中取得强劲业绩。该公司多元化收入流在供应受限的环境中展现出韧性。
